requirement_topic.en: Market Access — ZABS conformity, import inspection, ZABS mark, and in-country importer
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入——ZABS合格评定、进口检验、ZABS标志及在地进口商
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入——ZABS合格評定、進口檢驗、ZABS標誌及在地進口商

summary.en: Zambia controls market access through the Zambia Bureau of Standards (ZABS), which administers compulsory Zambian Standards and a conformity-assessment / import-inspection scheme for regulated products. Where a lithium battery or power bank falls under a compulsory standard, importation generally requires conformity evidence (test reports to the adopted ZS/IEC standard), import inspection, and use of the ZABS mark on regulated products. Unlike the EU, there is no Authorised Representative concept; instead an in-country importer of record is the responsible party for customs clearance and conformity. Because Zambia is landlocked, goods typically transit via the ports of Dar es Salaam (Tanzania) or Durban (South Africa), so transit and pre-shipment documentation should align with the inland-clearance route. Exporters should confirm with ZABS whether a pre-shipment / destination inspection or import permit applies to the specific consignment.
summary.zh: 赞比亚通过赞比亚标准局（ZABS）控制市场准入，ZABS负责管理强制性赞比亚标准及对受管制产品的合格评定／进口检验方案。当锂电池或移动电源属于强制标准范围时，进口通常须提供合格证据（依采纳ZS/IEC标准的测试报告）、进口检验，并在受管制产品上加施ZABS标志。与欧盟不同，赞比亚没有授权代表概念；而是由在地进口商（记录进口商）作为清关与合规的责任方。由于赞比亚为内陆国，货物通常经达累斯萨拉姆（坦桑尼亚）或德班（南非）港口转运，因此过境及发货前文件应与内陆清关路线相匹配。出口商应向ZABS确认具体货物是否适用发货前／目的地检验或进口许可。
summary.zht: 尚比亞透過尚比亞標準局（ZABS）控制市場准入，ZABS負責管理強制性尚比亞標準及對受管制產品的合格評定／進口檢驗方案。當鋰電池或行動電源屬於強制標準範圍時，進口通常須提供合格證據（依採納ZS/IEC標準的測試報告）、進口檢驗，並在受管制產品上加施ZABS標誌。與歐盟不同，尚比亞沒有授權代表概念；而是由在地進口商（記錄進口商）作為清關與合規的責任方。由於尚比亞為內陸國，貨物通常經達累斯薩拉姆（坦尚尼亞）或德班（南非）港口轉運，因此過境及發貨前文件應與內陸清關路線相匹配。出口商應向ZABS確認具體貨物是否適用發貨前／目的地檢驗或進口許可。

standards_or_laws: Standards Act / Compulsory Standards Act (Zambia) — administered by ZABS
ZABS conformity assessment, import inspection, and ZABS product certification mark scheme
Zambia Revenue Authority (ZRA) customs clearance via in-country importer of record

summary.en: China's domestic market-access analogue is CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for in-scope finished electronic products, plus product-safety standards such as GB 31241 for portable lithium batteries. CCC is administered by Chinese certification bodies and applies inside China; it grants no rights in Zambia and is not recognised by ZABS. China has no equivalent of an EU Authorised Representative or of a third-country ZABS import-inspection mark; the responsible party in China is the domestic manufacturer/importer under SAMR oversight.
summary.zh: 中国国内市场准入的对应物是对适用成品电子产品的CCC（中国强制性认证），以及如GB 31241等便携式锂电池产品安全标准。CCC由中国认证机构管理并适用于中国境内；其在赞比亚不产生任何权利，ZABS亦不予认可。中国没有相当于欧盟授权代表或第三国ZABS进口检验标志的制度；中国的责任方是受SAMR监管的国内制造商／进口商。
summary.zht: 中國國內市場准入的對應物是對適用成品電子產品的CCC（中國強制性認證），以及如GB 31241等便攜式鋰電池產品安全標準。CCC由中國認證機構管理並適用於中國境內；其在尚比亞不產生任何權利，ZABS亦不予認可。中國沒有相當於歐盟授權代表或第三國ZABS進口檢驗標誌的制度；中國的責任方是受SAMR監管的國內製造商／進口商。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — domestic market access for in-scope finished electronic products

gap.en: The Zambian market-access path differs structurally from both China and the EU. Key gaps: (1) appoint an in-country importer of record (no EU-style Authorised Representative exists, but a local responsible party is needed for customs and ZABS); (2) confirm whether the product is on the ZABS compulsory-standard list and therefore needs conformity evidence, import inspection, and the ZABS mark; (3) check whether pre-shipment inspection or an import permit applies; (4) plan landlocked logistics via Dar es Salaam or Durban, ensuring battery transit documents and dangerous-goods paperwork match the inland route; (5) Chinese CCC grants no Zambian market rights. Verify current ZABS regulated-product scope and inspection procedures, which can change.
gap.zh: 赞比亚市场准入路径在结构上既不同于中国也不同于欧盟。主要差距：（1）指定在地记录进口商（无欧盟式授权代表，但清关与ZABS需要本地责任方）；（2）确认产品是否列入ZABS强制标准清单，从而需要合格证据、进口检验及ZABS标志；（3）核查是否适用发货前检验或进口许可；（4）规划经达累斯萨拉姆或德班的内陆物流，确保电池过境文件与危险品文书与内陆路线一致；（5）中国CCC不授予赞比亚市场权利。请核实当前ZABS受管制产品范围及检验程序，二者可能变动。
gap.zht: 尚比亞市場准入路徑在結構上既不同於中國也不同於歐盟。主要差距：（1）指定在地記錄進口商（無歐盟式授權代表，但清關與ZABS需要本地責任方）；（2）確認產品是否列入ZABS強制標準清單，從而需要合格證據、進口檢驗及ZABS標誌；（3）核查是否適用發貨前檢驗或進口許可；（4）規劃經達累斯薩拉姆或德班的內陸物流，確保電池過境文件與危險品文書與內陸路線一致；（5）中國CCC不授予尚比亞市場權利。請核實當前ZABS受管制產品範圍及檢驗程序，二者可能變動。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the product is a regulated/compulsory-standard item — ZABS conformity assessment, import inspection, and ZABS mark apply; an in-country importer of record is required for customs clearance
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — CCC where in scope plus GB 31241 safety; grants no rights in Zambia

source.publisher: Zambia Bureau of Standards (ZABS) — Conformity Assessment / Import Inspection

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Zambian market access runs through ZABS conformity assessment and import inspection, with the ZABS mark on regulated products and an in-country importer of record as the responsible party (no EU-style Authorised Representative exists). Chinese CCC grants no rights in Zambia. Exporters should confirm the ZABS regulated-product scope, whether pre-shipment inspection or an import permit applies, and plan landlocked logistics via Dar es Salaam or Durban.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 赞比亚市场准入通过ZABS合格评定与进口检验进行，受管制产品加施ZABS标志，并以在地记录进口商作为责任方（无欧盟式授权代表）。中国CCC在赞比亚不产生权利。出口商应确认ZABS受管制产品范围、是否适用发货前检验或进口许可，并规划经达累斯萨拉姆或德班的内陆物流。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 尚比亞市場准入透過ZABS合格評定與進口檢驗進行，受管制產品加施ZABS標誌，並以在地記錄進口商作為責任方（無歐盟式授權代表）。中國CCC在尚比亞不產生權利。出口商應確認ZABS受管制產品範圍、是否適用發貨前檢驗或進口許可，並規劃經達累斯薩拉姆或德班的內陸物流。
